name.full: My Day — Personal Cockpit for Microsoft 365 Copilot

description.short: Your personal daily cockpit — meetings, tasks, news and mail at a glance.
description.full: My Day is a personalized daily cockpit that lives inside the Microsoft 365 Copilot canvas. It greets the signed-in user and surfaces their next meeting, tasks due today, latest SharePoint news and important mail — starting as a compact inline card and expanding into a full daily dashboard with an agenda timeline, a tasks completion ring, important mail, a news wall, quick actions, and a 'Plan my day' focus assistant that prioritizes what to work on next. This sample ships with demo (mock) data so it can be deployed and demoed in minutes.
